title: We are using err in defer function, needs to be defined name
body:
Since we are checking if err is non nil in defer function we need
to define it, so that the check will work correctly.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@mheon  
This is to fix the issue that @mrunalp  saw when we closed the store on an error that may or may not have happened.

:pushpin: Commit e864e4f has been approved by `mheon`
